title: While the Light Holds

lyrics.verse_1:
The screen door swings and the kids run out
Barefoot through the grass with their arms flung wide
There's honey in the air and the day cools down
And the first star's barely showing in a lavender sky
Your mother's humming something old
From the porch where the jasmine climbs
And I swear I feel eternity
Folded up inside this evening time
lyrics.pre_chorus:
There's an ache beneath my ribs tonight
Like my heart already knows
That the years will try to steal this
But I'm not letting go
lyrics.chorus:
Let me live right here while the light holds
Let me feel every second burning slow
With my arms around everything I know
I'm staying right here while the light holds
lyrics.verse_2:
Your daddy lifts his glass and says a prayer
For the mercy of an ordinary night
The little one's asleep against your chest
Her hand wrapped 'round your finger holding tight
And the radio through the window plays
Some song we'll swear was always ours
And I want to press this into stone
Every voice, every firefly, every star
lyrics.bridge:
I know the morning's coming for these hours
Gonna scatter every shadow from this yard
These babies won't stay babies
And time won't ask us if it's hard
But right now, Lord, right now
This is everything we are
lyrics.outro:
Let me live right here while the light holds
Every second... burning slow
Still golden, still ours
While the light holds

chord_chart:
=== INTRO (8 bars — fingerpicked, let each chord ring) ===
| G | D/F# | Em7 | Cadd9 | G | D/F# | Em7 | Cadd9 |

=== VERSE 1 (16 bars — pattern repeats 4x, two lyric lines per pass) ===
| G | D/F# | Em7 | Cadd9 |
| G | D/F# | Em7 | Cadd9 |
| G | D/F# | Em7 | Cadd9 |
| G | D/F# | Em7 | Cadd9 |

=== PRE-CHORUS (8 bars) ===
| Am7 | Cadd9 | G | D |
| Am7 | Cadd9 | Dsus4 | D |

=== CHORUS (8 bars — open strumming, let it breathe) ===
| Cadd9 | G | D | Em7 |
| Cadd9 | G | Dsus4 | D |

=== VERSE 2 (16 bars — same as Verse 1, add light strumming) ===
| G | D/F# | Em7 | Cadd9 | (x4)

=== PRE-CHORUS (8 bars — same as before) ===
| Am7 | Cadd9 | G | D |
| Am7 | Cadd9 | Dsus4 | D |

=== CHORUS (8 bars — full band, more drive) ===
| Cadd9 | G | D | Em7 |
| Cadd9 | G | Dsus4 | D |

=== BRIDGE (8 bars — strip back, build slowly) ===
| Am | Em | Cadd9 | G/B |
| Am | Cadd9 | Dsus4 | D |

=== OUTRO (12 bars — deconstruct, return to fingerpicking) ===
| Cadd9 | G | D | Em7 |
| Cadd9 | G | Dsus4 | D |
| G | D/F# | Em7 | Cadd9 (let ring, fade) |
notes:
GUITAR: Standard tuning. Intro and Verse 1 are fingerpicked — thumb walks the descending bass line G→F#→E→C while fingers roll the upper strings. Think Travis-picking meets gospel piano. Transition to gentle hybrid picking in Verse 2, then full open strumming at the first chorus. The D/F# is essential — that descending bass movement (G-F#-E-C) is the emotional spine of the song; don't substitute a plain D. Use Cadd9 (x32030) and Em7 (022030) voicings so the open B and high E strings ring as a common tone throughout — this creates the shimmer.

DYNAMIC ARC: The song should feel like a slow sunrise in reverse — it starts quiet and intimate, blooms fully open at the second chorus, then gently folds back inward for the outro. Bridge is the emotional climax: strip to just voice and guitar for the first four bars ('I know the morning's coming...'), then let percussion and any additional instruments re-enter on 'But right now, Lord, right now' with a swell into the final word 'are' that hangs and decays into the soft outro.

VOCAL DIRECTION: Verse 1 should be conversational and close-mic'd, almost spoken in rhythm — Tyminski's ache with Blacc's warmth underneath. Let the chest voice carry the verses. Pre-chorus lifts into mixed voice. Chorus opens into a full, ringing tenor — sing 'while the light holds' like you're trying to physically hold something from slipping away. Bridge is raw, nearly breaking. Outro is a whisper — the singer letting go.

OUTRO DETAIL: On 'Every second... burning slow,' leave a full beat of silence at the ellipsis. The final 'While the light holds' should be sung once, unaccompanied except for a single fingerpicked G chord that sustains and fades. No hard ending — let it dissolve like the evening it describes.

ESTIMATED DURATION: ~4:00 at 92 BPM (100 bars total).
